text: Hi, my name is Meghan, and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? No, I'm over, but I don't even own a car, so you don't need to know anything.
